heading: Prohibition on payments to fossil fuel refiners and importers
label: 2209k Prohibition on payments to fossil fuel refiners and importers
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was in the original “” but probably should have been a reference to section 9001 of the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002, , which is classified to .Section 8101 of this title7 U.S.C. 8101Pub. L. 107–171section 8101 of this title

children.text: to provide a payment to a refiner or importer (as those terms are defined in section 80.2 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations (or successor regulations)); or

children.label: A
children.text: the renewable fuel program under section 7545() of title 42; oro

children.label: B
children.text: any other provision of law that requires the blending of fossil fuel with renewable fuel.

children.label: b
children.text: The exclusion in (a) shall not apply to any payments or support to producers, refiners, or importers of biofuel (as defined in ).section 8101 of this title

children.heading: .—Moratorium on Authorities Relating to Exchanges of Agricultural Products for Petroleum Products
children.label: c .—Moratorium on Authorities Relating to Exchanges of Agricultural Products for Petroleum Products
children.text: The authorities under the ninth and tenth sentences of (relating to the availability of agricultural products for the Secretary of Energy to exchange for petroleum products and the terms and conditions of those exchanges, respectively) shall not be used during the 180-day period beginning on .section 714b(h) of title 15October 1, 2020
